dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Bob. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Bob! How can I help you today?
I work as a data scientist. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A data scientist — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
I mostly work with design. Currently working on project_B.
Got it! Sounds like you have a solid skill set.
Outside of work I enjoy reading, cooking. I also like reading about web development.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
I prefer a structured approach to work. My go-to tools are Vim and Docker.
Noted! I'll keep your structured preference in mind.
